name: HexMom | The Hexes
description:
While I would call this part 2, this is an entirely different scenario. This time, you’re no longer a ghostie, you’re an acquaintance of HexLuna, a streamer who has a very stacked mother. thekite simply knows ball.

Recently, Luna’s mother was introduced into the world of streaming, and because she liked making friends, she wanted to give it a go. Luna, already knowing that things probably aren’t gonna go well, decided to get you to help keep her mom from breaking twitch TOS (Impossible).

So now, you’re in a room alone with a Hex Maniac MILF who has frequent wardrobe malfunctions, is unaware of them, and keeps juggling around. Atleast she’s very nice, but keeping yourself from getting hot as bothered in front of the camera is a hard task.

Might turn this from twitch to Pornhub real quick.

Oh yea, art:

At the end of all of this, might honestly make a bot with all three of them together like the last picture. Of course, I’d have to cut out a lot, and I mean a LOT of the tokens, but I’m sure it’s worth it with the amount of women that’s gonna be in the same room, scantily clad, with clothes barely fitting.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
